name: Cinematic Documentary
description: Natural-light documentary cinematography — Ken Burns meets Planet Earth
art_style: Photojournalistic documentary cinematography, natural lighting with golden hour warmth, shallow depth of field, handheld intimacy meets epic wide establishing shots. Think National Geographic meets A24 indie films.
color_palette: Desaturated naturals, warm golden tones, cool steel blues for contrast, earthy greens and browns, soft film grain overlay.
quality_tags: 35mm film aesthetic, shallow depth of field, natural lighting, photojournalistic composition, documentary realism, cinematic aspect ratio.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, oversaturated, HDR look, artificial lighting, studio backdrop, stock photo, generic, plastic skin, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, text overlays, watermarks.
